query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.printerId, pr.name as printerName, pr.ipAddress, pr.isActive 
FROM products p 
LEFT JOIN printers pr ON p.printerId = pr.id 
WHERE p.establishmentId = 30001 
LIMIT 20;
